news.summary: Arab digital creators on social media are turning out edgy material to cope with the conflicts and bring levity to a pain that often feels too raw.

news.headline: Coast Guard Calls Off Search for Crew of Capsized Cargo Ship
news.summary: The Mariana, a 145-foot vessel with six crew members, was found overturned after a typhoon, prompting an 11-day search which found no survivors.

news.headline: Epstein Obtained Objects From Islam’s Holiest Site for His Island ‘Mosque’
news.summary: Jeffrey Epstein’s messages cast light on an unusual building on his private island and show how his connections helped him secure tapestries from Mecca for it.

news.headline: London police say stabbing of 2 Jewish men is declared a terrorist incident
news.summary: Two Jewish men were stabbed and injured in a London street on Wednesday, in what police called an act of terrorism. news.headline: White House dinner attack: Man charged in Trump assassination bid took photo with knife before assault

news.headline: New images show suspect taking selfies before Washington press dinner shooting
news.summary: Prosecutors argue Cole Tomas Allen should remain in custody until trial on a charge of attempted assassination of President Donald Trump.

news.headline: How Iranian diplomats turned embassy accounts into viral meme machines
news.summary: Memes, humour, and trolling of American politicians: This is how a handful of Iranian embassies have become superstars on “X”, attracting millions of views.
